lesson.menu_desc: would like to & hope to -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 17 -- Talking About the Future & Dreams
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Tânia Rosa | Aula 17 -- Talking About the Future & Dreams

listenings.text: Let me tell you about my big dream. Someday, I would love to live abroad, maybe by the sea. I hope to become fluent in two languages, so I can talk to anyone, anywhere. I have a small bucket list, and at the top is a long, slow trip across Europe. I would like to retire early and travel the whole year. It is a big goal, I know, but I really believe I can achieve it. Every small step is a new opportunity. What about you? What do you dream of?

A friend asked me about my goals for the next five years, so let me share them. First, I hope to learn to cook real Italian food. Then, I would like to visit Japan; it has been on my bucket list for years. I also wish to start my own small business someday. My biggest goal is to work abroad, because I would love to live in a new country. I know it will not be easy, but with hard work, I am sure I can achieve my dreams. Never stop dreaming.

extra_audio.text: First, I hope to become fluent in English this year. Then, I would like to travel abroad and see the world. After that, I wish to start my own small business someday. Next, my big goal is to retire early and live by the sea. Finally, I would love to cross every item off my bucket list, because every dream is a new opportunity.
